name: copilot-premium-request-tracker
description: See your GitHub Copilot premium request usage directly in the VS Code status bar.

copilotUsageInsights.refreshIntervalMinu.markdownDescription: How often (in minutes) the extension refreshes your Copilot usage data from GitHub.

copilotUsageInsights.threshold.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable color-coded warnings in the status bar when usage exceeds configured thresholds.

copilotUsageInsights.threshold.warning.markdownDescription: Usage percentage at which the status bar turns warning color.

copilotUsageInsights.threshold.critical.markdownDescription: Usage percentage at which the status bar turns critical/error color.

enumDescriptions: No text — show only the graphic visualization
+$0.00 — show only the billed overage amount
copilotUsageInsights.statusBarTextMode.markdownDescription: Text portion of the status bar display. Set to `none` to show only the graphic.

copilotUsageInsights.statusBarGraphicMod.markdownDescription: Graphic/visual portion of the status bar display. Set to `none` to show only text.

enumDescriptions: Text appears to the left of the graphic — e.g. 50% [■■■■□□□□]
Text appears to the right of the graphic — e.g. [■■■■□□□□] 50%
copilotUsageInsights.statusBarTextPositi.markdownDescription: Controls whether the text label appears to the left or right of the graphic when both are enabled.

copilotUsageInsights.segmentedBarWidth.markdownDescription: Number of segments in bar-style graphic modes (segmented, blocks, dots, circles).

copilotUsageInsights.showBillingDetails.markdownDescription: Enable billing-powered per-model request details in the dashboard and tooltip. Requires a one-time `user` scope upgrade when first enabled.

copilotUsageInsights.showCostInStatusBar.markdownDescription: Append the billed cost / net amount (e.g. `· $1.20`) to the status bar text when billing details are available.

copilotUsageInsights.showBillingRequestB.markdownDescription: Show the Requests by Model breakdown when billing details are enabled. Disable to hide the model-level table while keeping billing summary data visible.

scripts.pretest: npm run build && npm run check
